records.question: Which feature types include the Swimming Pool feature description exactly?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT ref_feature_types.feature_type_code FROM ref_feature_types
JOIN other_available_features ON ref_feature_types.feature_type_code = other_available_features.feature_type_code
WHERE other_available_features.feature_description = 'Swimming Pool.'
records.pred_sql: select ref_feature_types.feature_type_code from other_available_features join ref_feature_types on other_available_features.feature_type_code = ref_feature_types.feature_type_code where other_available_features.feature_description like '%swimming pool%' limit 5;
records.thought: To find feature types that include the 'Swimming Pool' feature description, I will join the Other_Available_Features and Ref_Feature_Types tables, filtering for the specific feature description and selecting the feature type code.
